response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed the video's audio track to identify any vocal music. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists entirely of instrumental, loop-based background music and the streamer's own commentary, with no vocal performances. 3. Defined the scenes based on the actions taken in the Minecraft gameplay (building, farming, organizing, and coop maintenance). 4. Concluded that no song metadata or lyrics need to be resolved.
response.global_summary: Gameplay video featuring the VTuber Takane Lui playing Minecraft. She builds a platform, sets up a pumpkin farm, stores the harvested pumpkins in chests, and checks on her chicken coop. The video contains only instrumental background music and streamer commentary; no vocal songs are present.

scenes.description: The VTuber builds a dirt platform and a path over the water.
The VTuber sets up a farming area, hoes the ground, and plants pumpkin seeds, while managing water placement.
The VTuber finishes the pumpkin farm layout and cleans up the surrounding area.
The VTuber stores items in chests and inspects the chicken coop.
